Package index

Professional Women’s Hockey League

Family Overview

PWHL endpoint family overview

pwhl pwhl_overview pwhl_game pwhl_team pwhl_player pwhl_league
PWHL (Professional Women's Hockey League) Endpoint Overview

Game Data

Functions for accessing PWHL game-level data

pwhl_schedule()
PWHL Schedule
pwhl_scorebar()
PWHL Scorebar
pwhl_game_info()
PWHL Game Information
pwhl_game_summary()
PWHL Game Summary
pwhl_pbp()
PWHL Play-by-play
pwhl_player_box()
PWHL Player Game Box Scores

Team Data

Functions for accessing PWHL team-level data

pwhl_teams()
PWHL Teams
pwhl_team_roster()
PWHL Rosters
pwhl_standings()
PWHL Standings

Player Data

Functions for accessing PWHL player-level data

pwhl_player_info()
PWHL Player Info
pwhl_player_stats()
PWHL Player Season Stats
pwhl_player_game_log()
PWHL Player Game Log
pwhl_player_search()
PWHL Player Search
pwhl_stats()
PWHL Stats
pwhl_leaders()
PWHL League Leaders
pwhl_streaks()
PWHL Player Streaks

League Data

Functions for accessing PWHL league-level data

pwhl_season_id()
PWHL Season IDs
pwhl_transactions()
PWHL Transactions
pwhl_playoff_bracket()
PWHL Playoff Bracket

PWHL Analytics

On-ice analytics for PWHL games (shifts, TOI, Corsi/Fenwick)

pwhl_game_shifts()
PWHL Game Shifts
pwhl_player_toi()
PWHL Player Time On Ice
pwhl_game_corsi()
PWHL Game Corsi/Fenwick (player-level on-ice)

AHL Data

AHL Endpoint Family

Live HockeyTech wrappers for the American Hockey League

ahl
AHL (American Hockey League) Endpoint Overview
ahl_game_corsi()

ahl_game_shifts()
AHL Game Shifts
ahl_game_summary()

ahl_leaders()

ahl_pbp()
AHL Play-by-Play
ahl_player_stats()

ahl_player_toi()

ahl_schedule()

ahl_season_id()
AHL Season IDs
ahl_standings()
AHL Standings
ahl_team_roster()

ahl_teams()

most_recent_ahl_season()

PWHL Data Loaders

Family Overview

PWHL loader family overview (release-tag catalog)

pwhl_loaders load_pwhl
PWHL Data Loaders Overview

Full Seasons of PWHL Data

Functions that load full seasons of pre-scraped PWHL data from the sportsdataverse-data releases

load_pwhl_pbp()
Load fastRhockey PWHL play-by-play
load_pwhl_player_box()
Load fastRhockey PWHL player box scores
load_pwhl_skater_box()
Load fastRhockey PWHL skater box scores
load_pwhl_goalie_box()
Load fastRhockey PWHL goalie box scores
load_pwhl_team_box()
Load fastRhockey PWHL team box scores
load_pwhl_schedule()
Load fastRhockey PWHL schedules
load_pwhl_rosters()
Load fastRhockey PWHL team rosters
load_pwhl_game_rosters()
Load fastRhockey PWHL per-game rosters
load_pwhl_game_info()
Load fastRhockey PWHL game info
load_pwhl_scoring_summary()
Load fastRhockey PWHL scoring summaries
load_pwhl_penalty_summary()
Load fastRhockey PWHL penalty summaries
load_pwhl_three_stars()
Load fastRhockey PWHL three stars
load_pwhl_officials()
Load fastRhockey PWHL officials
load_pwhl_shots_by_period()
Load fastRhockey PWHL shots-by-period
load_pwhl_shootout()
Load fastRhockey PWHL shootout summaries

Naming-parity Aliases (sportsdataverse-py)

Aliases of the canonical PWHL loaders, named to match sportsdataverse-py.

load_pwhl_player_boxscores()
Load PWHL player box scores (alias)
load_pwhl_skater_boxscores()
Load PWHL skater box scores (alias)
load_pwhl_goalie_boxscores()
Load PWHL goalie box scores (alias)
load_pwhl_team_boxscores()
Load PWHL team box scores (alias)
load_pwhl_schedules()
Load PWHL schedules (alias)

Update or Create PWHL Database

Functions that update and create a database of fastRhockey PWHL play-by-play data

update_pwhl_db()
Update or create a fastRhockey PWHL play-by-play database

NHL Data

Family Overview

NHL Web API endpoint family overview

nhl_web nhl_game nhl_schedule_family nhl_team_family nhl_player_family
NHL Web API Endpoint Overview

Game Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from the game endpoint of the NHL API

nhl_game_boxscore()
NHL Game Boxscore
nhl_game_feed()
NHL Game Feed
nhl_game_pbp()
NHL Game Play-by-Play
nhl_game_shifts()
NHL Game Shifts
nhl_game_story()
NHL Game Story
nhl_game_content()
NHL Game Content
nhl_gamecenter_landing()
NHL Gamecenter Landing
nhl_gamecenter_right_rail()
NHL Gamecenter Right Rail

Teams Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from the teams endpoint of the NHL API

nhl_teams()
NHL Teams
nhl_teams_info()
NHL Teams Info
nhl_teams_roster()
NHL Team Roster
nhl_teams_stats()
NHL Teams Stats
nhl_team_prospects()
NHL Team Prospects
nhl_team_scoreboard()
NHL Team Scoreboard

Club Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey for NHL club-level schedule and stats

nhl_club_schedule()
NHL Club Schedule
nhl_club_stats_season()
NHL Club Stats Season

Players Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from the players endpoint of the NHL API

nhl_player_info()
NHL Player Info
nhl_player_game_log()
NHL Player Game Log
nhl_player_spotlight()
NHL Player Spotlight
nhl_player_stats()
NHL Player Stats

Roster Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey for NHL roster information

nhl_roster_season()

Schedule Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from the schedule endpoint of the NHL API

nhl_schedule()
NHL Schedule
nhl_schedule_calendar()

Draft Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from the draft endpoint of the NHL API

nhl_draft()
NHL Draft
nhl_draft_year()

nhl_draft_prospects()
NHL Draft Prospects
nhl_draft_prospects_info()
NHL Draft Prospects Info
nhl_draft_rankings()
NHL Draft Rankings

Standings Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from the standings endpoint of the NHL API

nhl_standings()
NHL Standings
nhl_standings_season()
NHL Standings Season List

Scoreboard and Scores

Functions exported by fastRhockey for NHL scoreboard and scores data

nhl_scoreboard()
NHL Scoreboard
nhl_scores()
NHL Scores

Playoffs Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey for NHL playoff data

nhl_playoff_bracket()
NHL Playoff Bracket
nhl_playoff_carousel()
NHL Playoff Carousel
nhl_playoff_schedule()
NHL Playoff Schedule

Season and Stats Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey for NHL season metadata and aggregated stats

nhl_seasons()
NHL Seasons
nhl_stats_skaters()
NHL Stats API — Skater Stats
nhl_stats_goalies()
NHL Stats API — Goalie Stats
nhl_stats_teams()
NHL Stats API — Team Stats
nhl_stats_draft()
NHL Stats API — Draft Summaries
nhl_stats_seasons()
NHL Stats API — Seasons List
nhl_stats_misc()
NHL Stats API — Miscellaneous Endpoints
nhl_skater_stats_leaders()
NHL Skater Stats Leaders
nhl_goalie_stats_leaders()
NHL Goalie Stats Leaders

NHL Stats REST Family Overview

NHL Stats REST endpoint family overview

nhl_stats_rest nhl_stats
NHL Stats REST API Endpoint Overview

Stats REST Dedicated Wrappers

Dedicated wrappers for the NHL Stats REST API that were previously only reachable via nhl_stats_misc()

nhl_stats_franchise()
NHL Stats API — Franchise Listing
nhl_stats_players()
NHL Stats API — Players Listing
nhl_stats_glossary()
NHL Stats API — Glossary
nhl_stats_country()
NHL Stats API — Country Lookup
nhl_stats_config()
NHL Stats API — Config
nhl_stats_ping()
NHL Stats API — Ping
nhl_stats_skater_leaders()
NHL Stats API — Skater Leaders
nhl_stats_goalie_leaders()
NHL Stats API — Goalie Leaders
nhl_stats_skater_milestones()

nhl_stats_goalie_milestones()
NHL Stats API — Goalie Milestones
nhl_stats_team_listing()
NHL Stats API — Team Listing
nhl_stats_game_listing()
NHL Stats API — Game Listing
nhl_stats_content_module()
NHL Stats API — Content Module

NHL Edge Family Overview

NHL Edge analytics endpoint family overview

nhl_edge nhl_edge_skater nhl_edge_goalie nhl_edge_team nhl_cat_edge
NHL Edge Analytics Endpoint Overview

NHL Edge Analytics - Skater

Skater advanced metrics from NHL Edge (api-web.nhle.com/v1/edge/skater-*)

nhl_edge_skater_detail()

nhl_edge_skater_landing()

nhl_edge_skater_comparison()

nhl_edge_skater_shot_location_detail()

nhl_edge_skater_shot_location_top_10()

nhl_edge_skater_zone_time()

nhl_cat_edge_skater_detail()

nhl_records_venue()

NHL Helper Aggregators

Convenience functions that combine multiple NHL endpoint calls into a single tidy frame

nhl_game_ids_by_season()

nhl_all_players_by_season()

nhl_skater_summary_range()
NHL Skater Summary (Season Range)
nhl_goalie_summary_range()

ESPN NHL

ESPN NHL Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey sourced from ESPN’s NHL API (site.api.espn.com)

espn_nhl_athletes_index()
Get ESPN NHL Athletes Index (core-v2)
espn_nhl_award()
Get ESPN NHL Award (core-v2)
espn_nhl_awards()
Get ESPN NHL Awards (core-v2)
espn_nhl_calendar()
Get ESPN NHL Calendar
espn_nhl_calendar_offseason()
Get ESPN NHL Calendar Offseason Dates (core-v2)
espn_nhl_calendar_ondays()
Get ESPN NHL Calendar On-Days (core-v2)
espn_nhl_calendar_postseason()
Get ESPN NHL Calendar Postseason Dates (core-v2)
espn_nhl_calendar_regular_season()
Get ESPN NHL Calendar Regular-Season Dates (core-v2)
espn_nhl_coach()
Get ESPN NHL Coach (core-v2)
espn_nhl_coach_record()
Get ESPN NHL Coach Record (core-v2)
espn_nhl_coach_season()
Get ESPN NHL Coach Season (core-v2)
espn_nhl_coaches()
Get ESPN NHL Coaches (core-v2)
espn_nhl_conferences()
Get ESPN NHL Conferences
espn_nhl_countries()
Get ESPN NHL Countries (core-v2)
espn_nhl_draft()
Get ESPN NHL Draft
espn_nhl_franchise()
Get ESPN NHL Franchise (core-v2)
espn_nhl_franchises()
Get ESPN NHL Franchises (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game()
Get ESPN NHL Game Metadata (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_all()
Get ESPN NHL Game Data (PBP + Team Box + Player Box)
espn_nhl_game_broadcasts()
Get ESPN NHL Game Broadcasts (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_competition()
Get ESPN NHL Game Competition Detail (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_leaders()
Get ESPN NHL Game Leaders (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_odds()
Get ESPN NHL Game Odds (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_official_detail()
Get ESPN NHL Game Official Detail (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_officials()
Get ESPN NHL Game Officials (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_play()
Get ESPN NHL Game Play Detail (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_play_personnel()
Get ESPN NHL Game Play Personnel (core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_plays()
Get ESPN NHL Game Plays (core-v2 Play-by-Play)
espn_nhl_game_powerindex()

espn_nhl_game_predictor()

espn_nhl_game_probabilities()

espn_nhl_game_scoringplays()

espn_nhl_game_situation()

espn_nhl_game_status()

espn_nhl_game_team()
Get ESPN NHL Game Team (Competitor Detail, core-v2)
espn_nhl_game_team_leaders()

espn_nhl_game_team_linescores()

espn_nhl_game_team_record()

espn_nhl_game_team_roster()

espn_nhl_game_team_statistics()

espn_nhl_game_teams()

Get ESPN NHL Season Coaches (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_draft()
Get ESPN NHL Season Draft (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_draft_round_picks()
Get ESPN NHL Season Draft Round Picks (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_freeagents()
Get ESPN NHL Season Free Agents (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_futures()
Get ESPN NHL Season Futures (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_group()
Get ESPN NHL Season Group (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_group_children()
Get ESPN NHL Season Group Children (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_group_teams()
Get ESPN NHL Season Group Teams (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_groups()
Get ESPN NHL Season Groups (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_info()
Get ESPN NHL Season Info (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_players()
Get ESPN NHL Season Players (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_pointer()
Get ESPN NHL Current Season Pointer (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_powerindex()
Get ESPN NHL Season Power Index (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_powerindex_leaders()
Get ESPN NHL Season Power Index Leaders (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_team()
Get ESPN NHL Season Team (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_teams()
Get ESPN NHL Season Teams (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_type()
Get ESPN NHL Season Type (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_type_corrections()
Get ESPN NHL Season Type Corrections (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_type_leaders()
Get ESPN NHL Season Type Leaders (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_types()
Get ESPN NHL Season Types (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_week()
Get ESPN NHL Season Week (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_week_games()
Get ESPN NHL Season Week Games (core-v2)
espn_nhl_season_weeks()
Get ESPN NHL Season Weeks (core-v2)
espn_nhl_seasons()
Get ESPN NHL Seasons List (core-v2)
espn_nhl_standings()
Get ESPN NHL Standings
espn_nhl_standings_core()
Get ESPN NHL Standings (core-v2)
espn_nhl_statistics_league()
Get ESPN NHL League Statistics
espn_nhl_summary()
Get ESPN NHL Raw Game Summary
espn_nhl_talentpicks()
Get ESPN NHL Talent Picks (core-v2)
espn_nhl_team()
Get ESPN NHL Team Detail
espn_nhl_team_box()
Get ESPN NHL Team Box Score
espn_nhl_team_core()
Get ESPN NHL Team Core (core-v2)
espn_nhl_team_depthcharts()
Get ESPN NHL Team Depth Charts
espn_nhl_team_history()
Get ESPN NHL Team History
espn_nhl_team_injuries()
Get ESPN NHL Team Injuries
espn_nhl_team_leaders()
Get ESPN NHL Team Leaders
espn_nhl_team_news()
Get ESPN NHL Team News
espn_nhl_team_record()
Get ESPN NHL Team Record
espn_nhl_team_roster()
Get ESPN NHL Team Roster
espn_nhl_team_schedule()
Get ESPN NHL Team Schedule (site_v2) – alias for espn_nhl_schedule()
espn_nhl_team_transactions()
Get ESPN NHL Team Transactions
espn_nhl_teams()
Get ESPN NHL team names and IDs
espn_nhl_teams_core()
Get ESPN NHL Teams Core (core-v2 Collection)
espn_nhl_teams_site()
Get ESPN NHL Teams (site_v2) – alias for espn_nhl_teams()
espn_nhl_tournaments()
Get ESPN NHL Tournaments (core-v2)
espn_nhl_transactions()
Get ESPN NHL Transactions
espn_nhl_venue()
Get ESPN NHL Venue (core-v2)
espn_nhl_venues()
Get ESPN NHL Venues (core-v2)

Fox Sports NHL Data

Read-only Fox Sports (Bifrost) NHL wrappers (play-by-play, boxscore, odds, roster, stats, game log, standings, leaders)

fox_nhl_boxscore()
Get Fox Sports NHL boxscore
fox_nhl_league_leaders()
Get Fox Sports NHL statistical leaders
fox_nhl_odds()
Get Fox Sports NHL game odds
fox_nhl_pbp()
Get Fox Sports NHL play-by-play
fox_nhl_standings()
Get Fox Sports NHL standings
fox_nhl_team_gamelog()
Get Fox Sports NHL team game log
fox_nhl_team_roster()
Get Fox Sports NHL team roster
fox_nhl_team_stats()
Get Fox Sports NHL team stat leaders

fastRhockey Data

Family Overview

NHL loader family overview (release-tag catalog)

nhl_loaders load_nhl
NHL Data Loaders Overview

Full Seasons of NHL Data

Functions exported by fastRhockey which load full seasons of fastRhockey NHL data

load_nhl_pbp()
Load fastRhockey NHL play-by-play
load_nhl_pbp_lite()
Load fastRhockey NHL play-by-play (lite)
load_nhl_pbp_full()
Load fastRhockey NHL play-by-play (full, alias)
load_nhl_team_box()
Load fastRhockey NHL team box scores
load_nhl_player_box()
Load fastRhockey NHL player box scores
load_nhl_skater_box()
Load fastRhockey NHL skater box scores
load_nhl_goalie_box()
Load fastRhockey NHL goalie box scores
load_nhl_rosters()
Load fastRhockey NHL team rosters
load_nhl_game_rosters()
Load fastRhockey NHL per-game rosters
load_nhl_schedule()
Load fastRhockey NHL schedules
load_nhl_game_info()
Load fastRhockey NHL game info
load_nhl_scoring()
Load fastRhockey NHL scoring summary
load_nhl_penalties()
Load fastRhockey NHL penalty summary
load_nhl_three_stars()
Load fastRhockey NHL three stars / decisions
load_nhl_scratches()
Load fastRhockey NHL scratches
load_nhl_linescore()
Load fastRhockey NHL linescore
load_nhl_shifts()
Load fastRhockey NHL shifts
load_nhl_officials()
Load fastRhockey NHL officials
load_nhl_shots_by_period()
Load fastRhockey NHL shots by period
load_nhl_shootout()
Load fastRhockey NHL shootout summary

Naming-parity Aliases (sportsdataverse-py)

Aliases of the canonical NHL loaders, named to match sportsdataverse-py.

load_nhl_player_boxscore()
Load NHL player box scores (alias)
load_nhl_player_boxscores()
Load NHL player box scores (alias)
load_nhl_skater_boxscores()
Load NHL skater box scores (alias)
load_nhl_goalie_boxscores()
Load NHL goalie box scores (alias)
load_nhl_team_boxscore()
Load NHL team box scores (alias)
load_nhl_team_boxscores()
Load NHL team box scores (alias)
load_nhl_schedules()
Load NHL schedules (alias)

Update or Create NHL Database

Functions exported by fastRhockey which update and create a database of fastRhockey NHL play-by-play data

update_nhl_db()
Update or create a fastRhockey NHL play-by-play database

Included data

Data included within the package

nhl_team_logos phf_team_logos pwhl_team_logos
Data in the package for reference

Helpers

NHL xG Family Overview

NHL expected-goals pipeline overview

nhl_xg xg fastRhockey_xg
NHL Expected Goals (xG) Pipeline Overview

Helper Functions

Functions used internally by fastRhockey which assist in transforming or loading data

csv_from_url()
Load .csv / .csv.gz file from a remote connection
progressively()
Progressively
rds_from_url()
Load .rds file from a remote connection
most_recent_nhl_season()
Most Recent NHL Season
most_recent_nhl_season_api_param()
Most Recent NHL Season for NHL API
most_recent_pwhl_season()
Most Recent PWHL Season
most_recent_phf_season() deprecated
Most Recent PHF Season
helper_nhl_calculate_xg()
Calculate expected goals (xG) for play-by-play data
refresh_xg_models()
Force re-download of xG models

Deprecated PHF Functions

The Premier Hockey Federation (PHF) has ceased operations. These functions are deprecated and will emit warnings when called. Historical data may still be available via the load_phf_* functions.

PHF Family Overview

PHF endpoint family overview (all deprecated)

phf phf_deprecated
PHF (Premier Hockey Federation) Endpoint Overview — DEPRECATED

Deprecated PHF Functions

PHF function listing (all deprecated)

phf_game_all() deprecated
PHF Game All
phf_pbp() deprecated
phf_pbp
phf_team_box() deprecated
PHF Team Boxscore
phf_player_box() deprecated
PHF Player Boxscore
phf_schedule() deprecated
PHF Schedule
phf_league_info() deprecated
PHF League Information
phf_game_raw() deprecated
PHF Game Raw
phf_game_details() deprecated
PHF Game Details
phf_game_summary() deprecated
PHF Game Summary
phf_leaders() deprecated
PHF Player Leaderboards
phf_player_stats() deprecated
PHF Player Stats
phf_standings() deprecated
PHF Standings
phf_team_roster() deprecated
PHF Team Roster
phf_team_stats() deprecated
PHF Team Stats

Deprecated PHF Data Loaders

Data loaders for the defunct PHF league. Historical data may still be available but is no longer updated.

load_phf_pbp() deprecated
Load fastRhockey PHF play-by-play
load_phf_team_box() deprecated
Load fastRhockey PHF team box scores
load_phf_player_box() deprecated
Load fastRhockey PHF player box scores
load_phf_rosters() deprecated
Load fastRhockey PHF team rosters
load_phf_schedule() deprecated
Load fastRhockey PHF schedules
update_phf_db() deprecated
Update or create a fastRhockey PHF play-by-play database
